description_long: This is a single, closed-toe slip-on shoe with a visibly worn and dirty exterior, primarily light gray in color with a darker, scuffed sole. The upper part of the shoe features subtle perforated patterns on the toe area, likely for ventilation, and the material appears to be a flexible, possibly synthetic or leather-like fabric. The heel and sides show creasing and discoloration, indicating significant use and exposure to outdoor elements. The sole is thick, dark, and textured, providing grip and durability, with visible dirt and wear especially at the heel and edges. The shoe's opening is wide and slightly deformed, suggesting it has been repeatedly worn and possibly stretched. There are no visible logos, laces, or branding elements, and the overall appearance suggests it has been discarded or lost in an urban environment.
description: A heavily worn, light gray slip-on shoe with a dark, scuffed sole and visible creasing and dirt, lacking any visible branding or laces.
description_view_0: Front and side of the shoe are visible, showing the perforated toe area and the most pronounced dirt and wear on the upper and sole.
description_view_1: Side and partial top view, highlighting the wide opening, creased upper, and the transition from the light upper to the dark, dirty sole.
description_view_2: Rear and side view, emphasizing the collapsed heel, heavy sole wear, and overall deformation of the shoe's structure.
description_view_3: Back and side view, showing the heel's discoloration, scuffed sole, and the lack of any visible branding or decorative elements.
